name: SetTimer
code:
name = "SetTimer"
inputs = {"exec_in":"exec","delay":"float","looping":"bool"}
outputs = {"exec_out":"exec","on_timer":"exec"}
def process(exec_in, delay, looping):
    # SetTimer - simple fire-and-forget timer
    # Safer than Tick for delayed/periodic actions
    #
    # exec_in: Starts the timer
    # delay: Seconds until on_timer fires
    # looping: If True, fires repeatedly every 'delay' seconds
    #
    # exec_out: Fires immediately (continues execution)
    # on_timer: Fires after delay (and repeatedly if looping)
    #
    # Timer handling is done by the runtime.
    d = delay if delay and delay > 0 else 1.0
    return ('exec_out', 'on_timer')
